creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #1)

For the sake of being complete, covering the issue as part of the original PR makes the most sense.   Particularly since we already document the fix in SVN as a security issue it seems like we are only half done until vuxml matches up to the commit log.  I am ok with re-opening the original PR and awaiting the vuxml commit as a close action.
